headline: Stifel Lowers PT on Carnival Corporation & plc (CCL), Keeps a Buy
summary: Carnival Corporation & plc (NYSE:CCL) is one of the Most Undervalued Long Term Stocks to Buy According to Analysts. On March 11, Stifel analyst Steven Wieczynski lowered the firm’s price target on Carnival Corporation & plc (NYSE:CCL) from $40 to $35, while maintaining a Buy rating on the shares. ​The analyst noted that the reduced […]

headline: CARNIVAL CORPORATION & PLC TO HOLD CONFERENCE CALL ON FIRST QUARTER EARNINGS
summary: Carnival Corporation & plc (NYSE/LSE: CCL; NYSE: CUK) has scheduled a conference call with analysts for Friday, March 27, 2026, at 10 a.m. (EDT); 2 p.m. (GMT) to discuss the company's first quarter financial results which are expected to be released that morning.
